title: Delicate Dutch Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with delicate and dutch ingredients, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the sliced carrots and celery, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Pour in the beef broth, and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low, and add the sliced potatoes.
6. Simmer the stew for 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
